prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025 年理科组（理科/物理类）最低位次约 570→841→846→781→860，整体呈后移趋势，2025 年基准约 860 名。近 3 年位次在 781–860 之间窄幅波动，2025 年较 2024 年小幅后移约 79 名；2021–2025 年理科组计划数分别为 26→27→27→25→26 人，基本稳定在 25–27 人区间；2026 年物理类计划大幅扩招至 36 人，较 2025 年增加 10 人（扩幅约 38.5%），扩招将显著增加录取名额，使竞争压力有所缓解，位次数字预期增大。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 厦门大学为 985、211、双一流高校，软科主榜排名近年稳定在第 24–26 名（2026 年降至第 25 名），属于全国顶尖高校（Top25），学校层次对考生吸引力持续强劲；2026 年高考周期声誉评价为「明显负面」，涉及校园盗摄、就业困难、复试歧视等舆情；2025 年声誉评价为「偏负面」，招生情况自 2017 年以来持续恶化。抖音热度总排名第 5（高热），短视频曝光量大但负面舆情并存，报考心理上可能产生一定观望情绪。历史投档异常记录显示 2025 年厦门大学在部分省份出现招生下滑信号；厦门大学拥有 A+ 学科 4 个（化学、海洋科学、生物学、统计学），A 学科 3 个（工商管理、应用经济学、教育学），A- 学科 7 个，共 14 个 A- 及以上学科，学科实力雄厚。物理类招生专业中计算机类、会计学、经济学类、数学类等均对应 A 级学科，对考生有较强吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程等专业持续高热推荐，与厦门大学物理类招生专业高度相关；会计/财务/审计专业 热度分化但仍是热门方向。青海省 2026 年考生总数约 48,000 人（较 2025 年总人数 47,669 人略有增加），按历史比例估算物理类约 30,672 人，考生规模小幅增长，竞争略有加剧。；厦门大学位于福建省厦门市，非青海本省高校，无本地招生倾斜。青海省在厦门大学全国招生中占比极小（约 0.4%），跨省报考受地域偏好影响有限。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合 2025 年基准位次 860 名、2026 年物理类大幅扩招 10 人（扩幅 38.5%）使位次数字预期增大、学校声誉偏负面产生一定观望情绪、考生总数小幅增长、优势学科吸引力强等因素，考虑声誉负面信号和考生规模增长做小幅上调。预测最低位次约 1085 名，区间 958–1212 名。

major_tier_recommendation.tier_1:
一档（最难进）
- 会计学（会计、财务、审计，含双学士学位项目）
- 计算机类（AI与计算机）
- 经济学类（含双学士学位项目）
major_tier_recommendation.tier_2:
二档（中等）
- 工科试验班（航空航天与智能制造）
- 数学类（含景润拔尖班）
- 理科试验班（南强书院卓越领航班）
major_tier_recommendation.tier_3:
三档（相对好进）
- 理科试验班（海洋与生态环境类）
- 理科试验班（生命科学与医药健康类）
- 化学工程与工艺
major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 位次在预测区间 958–1212 名内，建议以二档专业为主力、一档专业冲刺、三档专业保底。位次优于区间下限（<958 名）可重点冲刺会计学、计算机类等王牌专业；位次接近区间上限（>1212 名）建议以三档专业稳妥为主。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for the Science Group (Science/Physics Category) was approximately 570→841→846→781→860, showing an overall backward trend, with a baseline of about 860 in 2025. In the past 3 years, rankings fluctuated narrowly between 781 and 860, with a slight backward shift of about 79 places in 2025 compared to 2024. The planned enrollment numbers for the Science Group from 2021 to 2025 were 26→27→27→25→26, basically stable in the range of 25–27. In 2026, the Physics Category plan significantly expands to 36 students, an increase of 10 students (about 38.5%) compared to 2025. This expansion will notably increase admission slots, easing competition pressure and expecting the ranking number to increase.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Xiamen University is a 985, 211, and Double First-Class university. Its Soft Science main ranking has been stable at 24–26 in recent years (dropping to 25th in 2026), placing it among the top national universities (Top 25). The university's level continues to strongly attract candidates. In the 2026 college entrance examination cycle, its reputation evaluation is 'clearly negative,' involving incidents such as campus voyeurism, employment difficulties, and discrimination in re-examinations. In 2025, the reputation evaluation was 'somewhat negative,' with enrollment conditions continuously deteriorating since 2017. Douyin popularity ranks 5th overall (high heat), with high short video exposure but coexisting negative public opinion, potentially causing some wait-and-see sentiment in application psychology. Historical abnormal admission records show that in 2025, Xiamen University experienced enrollment decline signals in some provinces. Xiamen University has 4 A+ disciplines (Chemistry, Marine Science, Biology, Statistics), 3 A disciplines (Business Administration, Applied Economics, Education), and 7 A- disciplines, totaling 14 disciplines at A- or above, demonstrating strong academic strength. Among the Physics Category admission majors, Computer Science, Accounting, Economics, and Mathematics all correspond to A-level disciplines, strongly attracting candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering continue to be highly recommended and are closely related to Xiamen University's Physics Category admission majors. Accounting/Finance/Auditing majors show differentiated popularity but remain popular directions. In 2026, the total number of candidates in Qinghai Province is about 48,000 (slightly increased from 47,669 in 2025). Estimated by historical proportion, the Physics Category has about 30,672 candidates, with a small increase in candidate scale, slightly intensifying competition. Xiamen University is located in Xiamen City, Fujian Province, not a local university in Qinghai, with no local admission preference. Qinghai Province accounts for a very small proportion (about 0.4%) of Xiamen University's national enrollment, and cross-province application is limitedly affected by regional preferences.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 860, the significant expansion of 10 students (38.5% increase) in the 2026 Physics Category, which is expected to increase the ranking number, the somewhat negative reputation causing some wait-and-see sentiment, the small increase in candidate numbers, and the strong attraction of advantageous disciplines, a slight upward adjustment is made considering negative reputation signals and candidate scale growth. The predicted minimum ranking is about 1085, with a range of 958–1212.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Hardest to Enter)
- Accounting (Accounting, Finance, Auditing, including dual degree programs)
- Computer Science (AI and Computer Science)
- Economics (including dual degree programs)
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Moderate)
- Engineering Pilot Class (Aerospace and Intelligent Manufacturing)
- Mathematics (including Jingrun Top Class)
- Science Pilot Class (Nanqiang College Excellence Leadership Class)
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easier to Enter)
- Science Pilot Class (Marine and Ecological Environment)
- Science Pilot Class (Life Science and Medical Health)
- Chemical Engineering and Technology
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking is within the predicted range of 958–1212, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main choice, aim for Tier 1 majors as a stretch, and use Tier 3 majors as safety options. If your ranking is better than the lower limit (<958), you can focus on aiming for top majors like Accounting and Computer Science. If your ranking is near the upper limit (>1212), it is recommended to prioritize Tier 3 majors for stability.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for the liberal arts group (liberal arts/history category) was approximately 128→204→170→165→266, showing a fluctuating and declining trend overall, with a baseline of about 266 in 2025. In 2025, the ranking dropped significantly by about 101 places compared to 2024, marking the worst performance in the past five years. The planned enrollment numbers for the liberal arts group from 2021 to 2025 were 13→12→12→14→13, remaining stable at 12–14. In 2026, the history category plans a slight expansion to 15 students, an increase of 2 students compared to 2025 (an expansion rate of about 15.4%). This expansion slightly increases admission slots, and the ranking number is expected to increase slightly.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Xiamen University is a 985, 211, and Double First-Class university. Its soft science main ranking has been stable at 24–26 in recent years (25th in 2026), placing it among the top universities nationwide (Top 25). The school's level strongly attracts liberal arts candidates. In the 2026 college entrance examination cycle, the reputation evaluation is 'clearly negative,' involving incidents such as campus theft, employment difficulties, and interview discrimination. In 2025, the reputation evaluation was 'somewhat negative,' with continued deterioration in admissions. Douyin popularity ranks 5th overall (high heat), with high exposure but coexisting negative public opinion. Historical admission anomaly records show that in 2025, Xiamen University experienced signs of declining admissions in some provinces. Xiamen University has outstanding advantages in liberal arts disciplines: Law A-, Sociology A-, Education A, Business Administration A, Applied Economics A, and Marxist Theory A-, which are highly matched with liberal arts admission majors.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Liberal arts majors such as Law, Chinese Language and Literature are hot and recommended; Accounting/Finance/Auditing are differentiated and wait-and-see but remain popular directions. In 2026, the total number of candidates in Qinghai Province is approximately 48,000, with an estimated history category of about 17,328 based on historical proportions. The candidate scale has slightly increased compared to 2025 (17,212), leading to a slight intensification of competition. Xiamen University is located in Xiamen City, Fujian Province, not a local university in Qinghai Province, so there is no local admission preference. Qinghai Province accounts for a very small proportion of Xiamen University's national admissions, and cross-province applications are limited by regional preferences.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 266, the slight expansion of 2 students in the history category in 2026 (expansion rate of 15.4%) leading to an expected increase in ranking numbers, the negative school reputation causing wait-and-see sentiment, a slight increase in total candidate numbers, and the strong appeal of liberal arts advantage disciplines, a slight upward adjustment is made considering negative reputation signals and candidate scale growth. The predicted minimum ranking is about 305, with a range of 270–340.

Tier 1 (Hardest to Enter)
- Accounting (Accounting, Finance, Audit, including dual degree programs)
- Economics (including dual degree programs)
- Humanities Experimental Class (including top-notch student training bases)
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:

- Sociology
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking is within the predicted range of 270–340, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main choice, aim for Tier 1 majors as a stretch, and use Tier 3 majors as a safety net. If your ranking is better than the lower limit of the range (<270), you can focus on aiming for top majors such as Accounting and Economics. If your ranking is close to the upper limit of the range (>340), it is recommended to play it safe with Tier 3 majors such as Public Administration.
